objective: Build the secure provider-neutral session catalog and conservative selector
prefetch: Read the slice plan and listed source files before broader search
constraints: No secrets or arbitrary executable commands
Project policy may narrow but not silently activate private routes
acceptance_criteria: Trust and capability evidence gate selection
Unknown attribution earns no capability credit
model_tier_reason: Architecture and security decisions govern provider trust, fallback, storage, and provenance
escalation_triggers: A requirement needs a new trust boundary
Project identity cannot be bounded safely
